seoTitle: Harrisville vs Hawkins Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Harrisville vs Hawkins Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Harrisville and Hawkins Creek.
heading: Harrisville vs Hawkins Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Harrisville, Queensland and Hawkins Creek, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hawkins Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Harrisville (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Harrisville or Hawkins Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Harrisville has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Hawkins Creek scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Harrisville scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Hawkins Creek scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Harrisville or Hawkins Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hawkins Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
